# Basic Example

This example demonstrates deploying the Power Platform tenant settings module with
all secure defaults. No input variables are required — the module applies a
security-hardened configuration out of the box.

<!-- markdownlint-disable MD033 -->
## Requirements

The following requirements are needed by this module:

- <a name="requirement_terraform"></a> [terraform](#requirement\_terraform) (>= 1.9, < 2.0)

- <a name="requirement_powerplatform"></a> [powerplatform](#requirement\_powerplatform) (~> 4.0)

## Resources

No resources.

<!-- markdownlint-disable MD013 -->

No required inputs.

## Optional Inputs

No optional inputs.

Description: The ID of the Power Platform tenant settings resource.
